channel.title: GitHub Nix Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Nix in GitHub

item.title: NixOS/nixpkgs
item.description: Nix Packages collection & NixOS

item.title: nix-community/nixvim
item.description: Configure Neovim with Nix! [maintainers=@GaetanLepage, @traxys, @MattSturgeon, @khaneliman]

item.title: nix-community/stylix
item.description: Theming framework for NixOS, Home Manager, nix-darwin, and Nix-on-Droid [maintainers=@awwpotato, @danth, @trueNAHO]

item.title: mitchellh/nixos-config
item.description: My NixOS configurations.

item.title: 0xc000022070/zen-browser-flake
item.description: Community-driven Nix Flake for the Zen browser

item.title: nix-community/home-manager
item.description: Manage a user environment using Nix [maintainer=@khaneliman, @rycee]

item.title: nix-community/nixos-generators
item.description: Collection of image builders [maintainer=@Lassulus]

item.title: ad-si/awesome-3d-printing
item.description: A curated list of awesome 3D printing resources

item.title: anotherhadi/nixy
item.description: Nixy simplifies and unifies the Hyprland ecosystem with a modular, easily customizable setup. It provides a structured way to manage your system configuration and dotfiles with minimal effort.

item.title: NotAShelf/nvf
item.description: Modular, extensible and distro-agnostic Neovim configuration framework for Nix/NixOS

item.title: nix-community/disko
item.description: Declarative disk partitioning and formatting using nix [maintainers=Lassulus Enzime iFreilicht Mic92 phaer]

item.title: nix-community/NixOS-WSL
item.description: NixOS on WSL [maintainer=@nzbr]

item.title: nix-community/nixos-apple-silicon
item.description: Resources to install NixOS bare metal on Apple Silicon Macs [maintainers=@tpwrules,@flokli,@yuyuyureka]

item.title: ryantm/agenix
item.description: age-encrypted secrets for NixOS and Home manager

item.title: SaumonNet/proxmox-nixos
item.description: The Proxmox Hypervisor, on NixOS [maintainers=@camillemndn @JulienMalka]

item.title: nix-community/nix-on-droid
item.description: Nix-enabled environment for your Android device. [maintainers=@t184256,@Gerschtli]

item.title: dustinlyons/nixos-config
item.description: General purpose Nix configuration for macOS / NixOS (with starter templates!)

item.title: oxalica/rust-overlay
item.description: Pure and reproducible nix overlay of binary distributed rust toolchains

item.title: NixOS/nix.dev
item.description: Official documentation for getting things done with Nix.

item.title: nix-community/plasma-manager
item.description: Manage KDE Plasma with Home Manager [maintainer=@HeitorAugustoLN]

item.title: nvmd/nixos-raspberrypi
item.description: Nix flake for a fully declarative NixOS on Raspberry Pi
